title: Map
description: Map provides an interactive map powered by Leaflet. It supports markers, location tracking, and configurable zoom, latitude, longitude, and marker behavior. The component allows easy integration and manipulation of map features.

sections.title: Markers Demo
sections.description: Demonstrates marker functionality with add, remove, and interactive features

sections.title: Polygons Demo
sections.description: Shows polygon drawing and management with different shapes and styles

sections.title: Location Demo
sections.description: GPS location tracking and user position detection

sections.title: Draw Controls Demo
sections.description: Interactive drawing tools for markers and polygons

sections.title: Popup Demo
sections.description: Interactive marker popups with dynamic content updates

sections.title: Fit Bounds Demo
sections.description: Automatic map fitting to show all markers and polygons

sections.title: POI Demo
sections.description: Demonstrates Points of Interest (POI) functionality with different categories and zoom-based visibility

props.name: zoomLevel
props.description: Two-way binding for the zoom level of the map. Supports both input and output via model() signal.

props.name: latitude
props.description: Two-way binding for the latitude of the map center. Supports both input and output via model() signal.

props.name: longitude
props.description: Two-way binding for the longitude of the map center. Supports both input and output via model() signal.

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: The native DOM element associated with this component. Read-only property inherited from NXComponent.

props.name: maxMarker
props.description: Maximum number of markers allowed on the map.

props.name: maxPolygon
props.description: Maximum number of polygons allowed on the map.

props.name: hasDraw
props.description: Whether the map should have a marker control.

props.name: hasLocator
props.description: Whether the map should have a location control.

props.name: fitToDraw
props.description: Whether map should contain all draw items.

props.name: limitDraw
props.description: Whether map draw has to limit in area.

props.name: addPoiToFitDraw
props.description: Whether to include POIs when fitting the map to draw items.

props.name: addMarkerOnTap
props.description: If true, user can add a marker by clicking/tapping on the map.

props.name: markerPlace
props.description: Position of the marker control on the map.

props.name: locatePlace
props.description: Position of the locate control on the map.

props.name: poiMinZoom
props.description: Minimum zoom level at which POI markers become visible.

props.name: markers
props.description: Array or single marker location(s) to be placed on the map.

props.name: polygons
props.description: Array or single polygon location(s) to be placed on the map.

props.name: pois
props.description: Array or single POI marker(s) to be placed on the map.

events.name: onMarkerAdded
events.description: Event triggered when a new marker is added to the map.

events.name: onMarkerClick
events.description: Event triggered when a marker is clicked on the map.

events.name: onMarkerChanged
events.description: Event triggered when marker positions are changed on the map.

events.name: onPolygonAdded
events.description: Event triggered when a new polygon is added to the map.

events.name: onPolygonClick
events.description: Event triggered when a polygon is clicked on the map.

events.name: onPolygonChanged
events.description: Event triggered when polygon positions are changed on the map.

events.name: onLocationFound
events.description: Event triggered when a location is found via the location control.

events.name: onPoiChanged
events.description: Event triggered when POI positions are changed on the map.

events.name: onPoiAdded
events.description: Event triggered when a new POI is added to the map.

events.name: onMapReady
events.description: Event triggered map is loaded.

events.name: onLoadError
events.description: Event triggered when map loading/initialization fails.

events.name: zoomLevel
events.description: Two-way binding for the zoom level of the map. Emits when zoom level changes.

events.name: latitude
events.description: Two-way binding for the latitude of the map center. Emits when center latitude changes.

events.name: longitude
events.description: Two-way binding for the longitude of the map center. Emits when center longitude changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Adds a marker to the specified location on the map.
 * @param location - The location where the marker should be placed.
 * @param emitEvents - Whether to emit events for the marker.
 */
async addMarker(location: AXMapMarker | AXMapMarker[], emitEvents = false)

/**
 * Removes markers by id or location; if not provided removes all markers
 */
removeMarker(location?: AXMapMarker | AXMapMarker[])

/**
 * Adds a polygon to the specified location on the map.
 * @param location - The location where the polygon should be placed.
 * @param emitEvents - Whether to emit events for the polygon.
 */
addPolygon(location: AXMapPolygon | AXMapPolygon[], emitEvents = false)

/**
 * Removes polygons by id or geometry; if not provided removes all polygons
 */
removePolygon(location?: AXMapPolygon | AXMapPolygon[])

/**
 * Retrieves all markers currently placed on the map.
 * @returns An array of `AXMapMarker` representing all markers.
 */
getMarkers(): AXMapMarker[]

/**
 * Retrieves all polygons currently placed on the map.
 * @returns An array of `AXMapPolygon` representing all polygons.
 */
getPolygons(): AXMapPolygon[]

/**
 * Retrieves all POI markers currently placed on the map.
 * @returns An array of `AXPoiMarker` representing all POI markers.
 */
getPois(): AXPoiMarker[]

/**
 * Clear all markers and polygons
 */
clearDrawItems()

/**
 * Get all markers and polygons
 */
getDrawItem()

/**
 * set markers and polygons
 */
async setDrawItem(data: AXMapData)

/**
 * Adjusts the map view to fit all markers and polygons currently on the map.
 */
fitBoundsToDrawItems()

/**
 * Sets the boundary limit for drawing
 * @param data - The polygon data defining the boundary
 */
setLimitDraw(data: AXMapPolygon[])

/**
 * Removes the boundary limit for drawing
 */
removeLimitDraw()

/**
 * Flies the map to a specific location with optional zoom, marker placement, and animation duration.
 *
 * @param location - The target location to fly to.
 * @param zoom - Optional zoom level for the map.
 * @param setMarker - Whether to set a marker at the destination.
 * @param duration - Optional duration for the fly animation.
 */
flyTo(location: AXMapMarker, zoom?: number, setMarker?: boolean, duration?: number)

/**
 * Update popup for a specific marker
 * @param marker - The marker to update
 * @param popup - The new popup text
 * @param open - Whether the popup should be opened after update
 * @param closeButton - Whether the popup should have a close button
 * @returns True if the update was successful, false otherwise
 */
updateMarkerPopup(marker: AXMapMarker, popup: string, open = false, closeButton = true): boolean

/**
 * Update popup for multiple markers
 * @param updates - Array of marker popup updates
 * @returns Number of markers successfully updated
 */
updateMarkersPopups(
  updates: { marker: AXMapMarker; popup: string; open?: boolean; closeButton?: boolean }[],
): number

/**
 * Refreshes POIs from providers, clearing existing POIs first
 */
async refreshPois(): Promise<void>

types.title: AXLeafletService
types.description: Service for managing Leaflet maps and related functionalities.

events.name: onZoomChanged
events.description: Emits when the zoom level of the map changes.

events.name: onLongitudeChanged
events.description: Emits when the longitude of the map center changes.

events.name: onLatitudeChanged
events.description: Emits when the latitude of the map center changes.

events.name: onMarkerChanged
events.description: Emits when marker data changes.

events.name: onPoiAdded
events.description: Emits when a poi is added.

events.name: onPoiChanged
events.description: Emits when a poi is changed.

events.name: onMarkerAdded
events.description: Emits when a marker is added.

events.name: onMarkerClick
events.description: Emits when a marker is clicked.

events.name: onLocationFound
events.description: Emits when the user's location is found.

events.name: onPolygonChanged
events.description: Emits when polygon data changes.

events.name: onLoadError
events.description: Emits when an error occurs during map load/initialization

events.name: onPolygonAdded
events.description: Emits when a polygon is added.

events.name: onPolygonClick
events.description: Emits when a polygon is clicked.

methods.content:
/**
 * Loads the Leaflet library and its plugins.
 */
async loadLeaflet(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Initializes the Leaflet map.
 * @param mapElement The HTML element to render the map in.
 * @param location The initial map center.
 * @param zoom The initial zoom level. Defaults to 13.
 */
async initMap(mapElement: HTMLElement, location: AXMapLatLng, zoom = 13)

/**
 * Creates a custom icon from SVG string or URL using the icon resolver if possible
 * @param iconSrc Path to the icon, SVG string, or icon key
 * @returns Leaflet icon
 */
async setCustomIcon(iconSrc: string): Promise<any>

/**
 * Gets the current Leaflet map instance.
 * @returns The Leaflet map instance or undefined if not initialized.
 */
getMap(): L.Map | undefined

/**
 * Gets the loaded Leaflet package.
 * @returns The Leaflet package.
 */
getLeafletPackage(): typeof import('leaflet')

/**
 * Sets the zoom level of the map.
 * @param zoom The new zoom level.
 */
setZoomLevel(zoom: number): void

/**
 * Sets the center of the map.
 * @param location The new center coordinates.
 */
setCenter(location: AXMapLatLng): void

/**
 * Flies the map to a specific location.
 * @param location The target location.
 * @param zoom Optional zoom level.
 * @param setMarker Whether to set a marker at the destination.
 * @param duration Animation duration in seconds.
 */
flyTo(location: AXMapLatLng, zoom?: number, setMarker = false, duration = 1.0): void

/**
 * Gets all markers currently on the map.
 * @returns Array of map markers.
 */
getMarkers(): AXMapMarker[]

/**
 * Gets all polygons currently on the map.
 * @returns Array of map polygons.
 */
getPolygons(): AXMapPolygon[]

/**
 * Gets all POI markers currently on the map.
 * @returns Array of POI markers.
 */
getPois(): AXPoiMarker[]

/**
 * Adds draw control to the map.
 * @param position Position of the draw control.
 * @param maxMarkers Maximum number of markers allowed.
 * @param maxPolygons Maximum number of polygons allowed.
 */
addDrawControl(
  position: AXMapControlPlace = 'topleft',
  maxMarkers = 1,
  maxPolygons = 1
): void

/**
 * Adds locate control to the map.
 * @param position Position of the locate control.
 */
addLocateControl(position: AXMapControlPlace = 'bottomright'): void

/**
 * Removes the draw control from the map.
 */
removeDrawControl(): void

/**
 * Removes the locate control from the map.
 */
removeLocateControl(): void

/**
 * Clears all drawn items from the map.
 * @param clearPois Whether to also clear POI markers.
 */
clearDrawItems(clearPois = false): void

/**
 * Gets all drawn items (markers and polygons).
 * @returns Object containing all drawn items.
 */
getDrawItem(): AXMapData

/**
 * Sets all drawn items on the map.
 * @param data The data to set.
 */
async setDrawItem(data: AXMapData)

/**
 * Fits the map view to all drawn items.
 * @param includePois Whether to include POIs in the fit.
 */
fitBoundsToDrawItems(includePois = false): void

/**
 * Sets a boundary for drawing operations.
 * @param boundaryPolygons Array of polygons defining the boundary.
 */
setBoundary(boundaryPolygons: AXMapPolygon[]): void

/**
 * Removes the boundary restriction.
 */
removeBoundary(): void

/**
 * Destroys the map and cleans up resources.
 */
destroyMap(): void

/**
 * Updates the popup for a specific marker.
 * @param marker The marker to update.
 * @param popup The new popup text.
 * @param open Whether to open the popup.
 * @param closeButton Whether to show a close button.
 * @returns True if successful, false otherwise.
 */
updateMarkerPopup(marker: AXMapMarker, popup: string, open = false, closeButton = true): boolean

/**
 * Updates popups for multiple markers.
 * @param updates Array of marker popup updates.
 * @returns Number of successfully updated markers.
 */
updateMarkerPopups(
  updates: { marker: AXMapMarker; popup: string; open?: boolean; closeButton?: boolean }[]
): number

/**
 * Adds markers to the map.
 * @param locations Single marker or array of markers.
 * @param emitEvents Whether to emit events.
 */
async addMarker(locations: AXMapMarker | AXMapMarker[], emitEvents = true): Promise<void>

/**
 * Adds polygons to the map.
 * @param polygons Single polygon or array of polygons.
 * @param emitEvents Whether to emit events.
 */
addPolygon(polygons: AXMapPolygon | AXMapPolygon[], emitEvents = true): void

/**
 * Adds POI markers to the map.
 * @param locations Single POI or array of POIs.
 */
async addPoi(locations: AXPoiMarker | AXPoiMarker[]): Promise<void>

/**
 * Sets the minimum zoom level for POI visibility.
 * @param minZoom The minimum zoom level.
 */
setPoiMinZoom(minZoom: number): void

/**
 * Gets the minimum zoom level for POI visibility.
 * @returns The minimum zoom level.
 */
getPoiMinZoom(): number

/**
 * Loads POIs from configured providers.
 */
async loadPoisFromProviders(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Refreshes all POIs from providers.
 */
async refreshPois(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Refreshes POIs from a specific provider.
 * @param providerKey The provider key.
 */
async refreshPoiByProvider(providerKey: string): Promise<void>

/**
 * Enables or disables adding markers on tap.
 * @param enabled Whether to enable the feature.
 */
setAddMarkerOnTap(enabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Removes markers from the map.
 * @param locations Single marker or array of markers to remove.
 */
removeMarker(locations?: AXMapMarker | AXMapMarker[]): void

/**
 * Removes polygons from the map.
 * @param locations Single polygon or array of polygons to remove.
 */
removePolygon(locations?: AXMapPolygon | AXMapPolygon[]): void

/**
 * Sets the maximum number of markers allowed.
 * @param maxMarkers The maximum number of markers.
 */
setMaxMarkers(maxMarkers: number): void

/**
 * Sets the maximum number of polygons allowed.
 * @param maxPolygons The maximum number of polygons.
 */
setMaxPolygons(maxPolygons: number): void
